captions.formal: A static camera captures continuous traffic on a major urban avenue lined with yellow autumn foliage, with the KOREA ELECTRIC ENGINEERING building and Korean text banners visible alongside the roadway.
captions.sarcastic: Behold the majestic flow of cars, buses, and trucks inching through intersections under traffic signals, because nothing captures the poetry of fall foliage like a long-exposure blur of tailpipes.
captions.humorous_tech: Traffic lights are basically the world's slowest standups—everyone stops, waits for permission to speak, then rushes to merge before the next red signal.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Yellow trees, golden daylight, mountains in the distance — and still nobody's letting you merge. Typical Monday in paradise.

captions.formal: Wearing a light jacket over an orange top, a focused employee operates a computer mouse and keyboard at her desk while the camera pans around her beneath circular disc ceiling lights.
captions.sarcastic: She's got the afro, the cross pendant, the pink nails, and a potted plant watching her every move, yet somehow the most exciting thing on screen is still a mouse being clicked.
captions.humorous_tech: Her afro is giving major cloud-scaling vibes, and those pink nails are clicking through merge conflicts like nobody's standup.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The cross pendant says faith, the pink nails say flair, the orange top under that jacket says 'I tried today' — and the only audience for all of it is a potted plant and some very round ceiling lights.

captions.formal: A fluffy orange kitten sits beneath leafy bushes before walking steadily toward the camera along a sunlit dirt path, its large round eyes and raised bushy tail clearly visible.
captions.sarcastic: An orange kitten with large round eyes and a raised tail approaches through the undergrowth, delivering the kind of high-stakes drama only a cat on a dirt path can provide.
captions.humorous_tech: Single-threaded fluffy orange process exits the bush cache and walks the sunlit path toward the lens, tail raised like an antenna seeking a stronger signal.
captions.humorous_non_tech: A fluffy orange kitten emerges from the bushes like it's fashionably late to a nap appointment, tail held high and eyes wide enough to get out of any trouble.
